name: Zombie Merge
author: Poki
description: Zombie Merge is a merge game where you place, merge, and upgrade your warriors to stop endless waves of zombies! Summon heroes, choose their positions on the battlefield, and merge identical ones to unlock stronger, more legendary fighters. Defeat zombies to earn coins, recruit more warriors, and build the ultimate defense team. The waves never stop, so keep merging and upgrading! Ready to crush the zombie invasion? How to play Zombie Merge? Click or tap to make the choice. Click and hold to move your heroes. Who created Zombie Merge? Zombie Merge is created by Endless Pixels. Play their other games on Poki: Eggsplosion , Zombie Rush , Zombie Bounce , Brainrot Craft , and Paper Block ! How can I play Zombie Merge for free? You can play Zombie Merge for free on Poki. Can I play Zombie Merge on mobile devices and desktop? Zombie Merge can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
